title: The Island’s Heat Becomes Deadly
description: On pages 7–10, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #8. The central beat is the island’s heat becomes deadly.
scene: The scene focuses on the island’s heat becomes deadly, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #8 shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: luffy!! Let me handle this thing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I'll smack it down to you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Pfft... Ahhh, this coolness is wonderful ...!!!

summary: The Island’s Heat Becomes Deadly. This part moves the Straw Hats from Fish-Man Island into the New World and begins the mystery of Punk Hazard.
